verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne Deo subjecta erit anima mea ?  ab ipso enim salutare meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ אֶל־אֱ֭לֹהִים דּֽוּמִיָּ֣ה נַפְשִׁ֑י מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ יְשׁוּעָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall not my soul be subject to God? for from him is my salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi Jedutunin edestä, edelläveisaajalle. (H62:2) Minun sieluni odottaa ainoastaan Jumalaa, joka minua auttaa.
verses.king_james: Truly my soul waiteth upon God: from him cometh my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et ipse Deus meus et salutaris meus ;  susceptor meus, non movebor amplius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ־ה֣וּא צ֭וּרִי וִישׁוּעָתִ֑י מִ֝שְׂגַּבִּ֗י לֹא־אֶמּ֥וֹט רַבָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he is my God and my saviour: he is my protector, I shall be moved no more.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän ainoastaan on kallioni, minun autuuteni, minun varjelukseni, etten minä kovin kompastuisi.
verses.king_james: He only is my rock and my salvation; he is my defence; I shall not be greatly moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quousque irruitis in hominem ?  interficitis universi vos,  tamquam parieti inclinato et maceriæ depulsæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אָ֤נָה ׀ תְּה֥וֹתְת֣וּ עַל־אִישׁ֮ תְּרָצְּח֢וּ כֻ֫לְּכֶ֥ם כְּקִ֥יר נָט֑וּי גָּ֝דֵ֗ר הַדְּחוּיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: How long do you rush in upon a man? you all kill, as if you were thrusting down a leaning wall, and a tottering fence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka kauvan te yhtä väijytte, että te kaikin häntä surmaatte, niinkuin kallistuvaa seinää ja raukeevaa muuria?
verses.king_james: How long will ye imagine mischief against a man? ye shall be slain all of you: as a bowing wall shall ye be, and as a tottering fence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen pretium meum cogitaverunt repellere ;  cucurri in siti :  ore suo benedicebant,  et corde suo maledicebant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֤ךְ מִשְּׂאֵת֨וֹ ׀ יָ֥עֲצ֣וּ לְהַדִּיחַ֮ יִרְצ֢וּ כָ֫זָ֥ב בְּפִ֥יו יְבָרֵ֑כוּ וּ֝בְקִרְבָּ֗ם יְקַֽלְלוּ־סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But they have thought to cast away my price; I ran in thirst: they blessed with their mouth, but cursed with their heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin he neuvoa pitävät, kukistaaksensa häntä korkeudestansa; he rakastavat valhetta: suullansa he siunaavat, ja sydämessänsä kiroilevat, Sela!
verses.king_james: They only consult to cast him down from his excellency: they delight in lies: they bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen Deo subjecta esto, anima mea,  quoniam ab ipso patientia mea :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ לֵ֭אלֹהִים דּ֣וֹמִּי נַפְשִׁ֑י כִּֽי־מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ תִּקְוָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But be thou, O my soul, subject to God: for from him is my patience.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun sieluni odottaa ainoastaan Jumalaa; sillä hän on minun toivoni.
verses.king_james: My soul, wait thou only upon God; for my expectation is from him.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia ipse Deus meus et salvator meus,  adjutor meus, non emigrabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ־ה֣וּא צ֭וּרִי וִישׁוּעָתִ֑י מִ֝שְׂגַּבִּ֗י לֹ֣א אֶמּֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he is my God and my saviour: he is my helper, I shall not be moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän ainoastaan on kallioni ja autuuteni, hän varjelukseni, en minä kaadu.
verses.king_james: He only is my rock and my salvation: he is my defence; I shall not be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Deo salutare meum et gloria mea ;  Deus auxilii mei, et spes mea in Deo est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־אֱ֭לֹהִים יִשְׁעִ֣י וּכְבוֹדִ֑י צוּר־עֻזִּ֥י מַ֝חְסִ֗י בֵּאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: In God is my salvation and my glory: he is the God of my help, and my hope is in God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalassa on minun autuuteni, minun kunniani, minun väkevyyteni kallio, minun turvani on Jumalassa.
verses.king_james: In God is my salvation and my glory: the rock of my strength, and my refuge, is in God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sperate in eo, omnis congregatio populi ;  effundite coram illo corda vestra :  Deus adjutor noster in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּטְח֘וּ־ב֤וֹ בְכׇל־עֵ֨ת ׀ עָ֗ם שִׁפְכֽוּ־לְפָנָ֥יו לְבַבְכֶ֑ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים מַחֲסֶה־לָּ֣נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Trust in him, all ye congregation of people: pour out your hearts before him. God is our helper for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te kansat, toivokaat häneen joka aika, vuodattakaat teidän sydämenne hänen eteensä: Jumala on meidän turvamme, Sela!
verses.king_james: Trust in him at all times; ye people, pour out your heart before him: God is a refuge for us. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen vani filii hominum,  mendaces filii hominum in stateris,  ut decipiant ipsi de vanitate in idipsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֤ךְ ׀ הֶ֥בֶל בְּנֵֽי־אָדָם֮ כָּזָ֢ב בְּנֵ֫י־אִ֥ישׁ בְּמֹאזְנַ֥יִם לַעֲל֑וֹת הֵ֝֗מָּה מֵהֶ֥בֶל יָֽחַד׃
verses.douay_rheims: But vain are the sons of men, the sons of men are liars in the balances: that by vanity they may together deceive.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ihmiset ovat kuitenkin turhat, voimalliset myös puuttuvat: he painavat vähemmän kuin ei mitään, niin monta kuin heitä on.
verses.king_james: Surely men of low degree are vanity, and men of high degree are a lie: to be laid in the balance, they are altogether lighter than vanity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite sperare in iniquitate,  et rapinas nolite concupiscere ;  divitiæ si affluant, nolite cor apponere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּבְטְח֣וּ בְעֹשֶׁק֮ וּבְגָזֵ֢ל אַל־תֶּ֫הְבָּ֥לוּ חַ֤יִל ׀ כִּֽי־יָנ֑וּב אַל־תָּשִׁ֥יתוּ לֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Trust not in iniquity, and covet not robberies: if riches abound, set not your heart upon them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät luottako vääryyteen ja väkivaltaan; älkäät turvatko niihin, mitkä ei mitään ole; jos rikkaudet teidän tykönne lankeevat, niin älkäät panko sydäntänne niiden päälle.
verses.king_james: Trust not in oppression, and become not vain in robbery: if riches increase, set not your heart upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Semel locutus est Deus ;  duo hæc audivi :  quia potestas Dei est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַחַ֤ת ׀ דִּבֶּ֬ר אֱלֹהִ֗ים שְׁתַּֽיִם־ז֥וּ שָׁמָ֑עְתִּי כִּ֥י עֹ֝֗ז לֵֽאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: God hath spoken once, these two things have I heard, that power belongeth to God,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala on kerran puhunut, sen olen minä kahdesti kuullut: että Jumala (yksinänsä) väkevä on.
verses.king_james: God hath spoken once; twice have I heard this; that power belongeth unto God.

verses.latin_vulgate: et tibi, Domine, misericordia :  quia tu reddes unicuique juxta opera sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְךָֽ־אֲדֹנָ֥י חָ֑סֶד כִּֽי־אַתָּ֨ה תְשַׁלֵּ֖ם לְאִ֣ישׁ כְּֽמַעֲשֵֽׂהוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And mercy to thee, O Lord; for thou wilt render to every man according to his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä Jumala olet armollinen; sillä sinä maksat jokaiselle työnsä jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Also unto thee, O Lord, belongeth mercy: for thou renderest to every man according to his work.
